name: personal-os-template
description: Launcher for Work HQ (work-hq/). The OS itself is markdown files and works without this — see README.

scripts.preflight:
node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync('work-hq/node_modules')){console.error('
Work HQ dependencies are not installed yet. Run:

  npm install --prefix work-hq
');process.exit(1)}"
